case_title: BLANCA R ESCOBAR VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA,INC. A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESCOBAR, BLANCA R AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA,INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
